name: Nextum Jobes

sheet.name: Nextum Jobes
sheet.background_story: Once a merchant who hired many mercenaries to protect their wares, soon realized the cost savings in learning to fight on their own. Once a mercenary who risked life for property, soon realized the gains made learning to take from others instead. Once a thief who robbed for themself, soon realized the value in joining a band like the Darkblade Guild.

description: Once a merchant who hired many mercenaries to protect their wares, soon realized the cost savings in learning to fight on their own. Once a mercenary who risked life for property, soon realized the gains made learning to take from others instead. Once a thief who robbed for themself, soon realized the value in joining a band like the Darkblade Guild.
